missing_considerations: 01_add-get-current-weather-tool/minimal_tests_to_pass.txt § Gate 3: Makes a live network call to wttr.in (urllib.request.urlopen). This gate will fail in offline or CI environments where outbound HTTP is blocked. The plan should note this dependency or provide a fallback (e.g. skip gate 3 when network is unavailable, or mock the HTTP layer for the structural test and add a separate optional live-smoke gate).
convention_violations: plan.txt § CHANGES: Section spans 55 lines (lines 10–64), exceeding the 50-line maximum. Trim or split the inline code block — the full function body does not need to be repeated verbatim here.

01_add-get-current-weather-tool/prompt_for_claude_code.txt: Does not reference the phase number anywhere. Convention requires the prompt to reference both the phase number (e.g. 'Phase 01' or '01_add-get-current-weather-tool') and the goal.
